objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: trend_supertrend
archetype: trend_supertrend
family: trend
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- supertrend(atr_period=13, multiplier=2.5)
- adx(period=11)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: supertrend.direction == 1 and adx.adx > 35
- short: supertrend.direction == -1 and adx.adx > 35
exit:
- condition: direction_change(supertrend.direction) or adx.adx < 25
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 2.25
tp_atr_mult: 3.5
description: ATR trailing stop (2.25x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.

code.validation_error_retry: [SIG001] `for i in range(...)` interdit dans la logique Builder.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy is based on two indicators - supertrend and adx, with ATR trailing stop (2.25x) and take-profit (3.5x). The market tested was APTUSDC 1h. It has not been backtested yet so no results are available. If the return is negative or low Sharpe ratio then adjustments could be made such as changing the atr_period, multiplier etc.
[Backup plan] If this strategy fails a different approach can be taken into account such as using bollinger bands, moving averages and RSI for identifying trends and generating signals to enter trades. Another alternative would be considering other technical indicators like MACD, stochastic oscillator which are widely used in trend following strategies.

iterations.hypothesis: Cette stratégie utilise des indications fiables pour trouver les signes de la direction en temps réel, avec une gestion des risques raisonnable et un design simple,
Using Supertrend and ADX to identify trending markets with strong momentum, combined with ATR-based risk management for potential reversals.
